title: Classic McEliece: The NIST Standard
description: Deep dive into Classic McEliece, the NIST-selected code-based KEM. Understand the specific construction, parameter sets, and why it offers the highest security confidence among post-quantum schemes.
learningObjectives: Understand Classic McEliece's specific construction choices
Analyze all NIST parameter sets and their security levels
Implement the KEM construction with Fujisaki-Okamoto transform
Compare Classic McEliece to other NIST selections
Evaluate deployment tradeoffs and use cases
